title: Resource Allocation Plan
scenario: Create a resource allocation plan for a software development project with 10 team members. The plan should include a list of team members, a brief description of each team member's role, and a list of tasks assigned to each team member. The output should be a clear and concise table summarizing the resource allocation plan.
constraints: Must include a title and a table with at least 4 columns

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the output is under 300 words and includes a title and a table with at least 4 columns.
Check if the list of tasks assigned to each team member is clear and concise.
Check if the description of each team member's role is clear and concise.
